Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3000 "EMERALDMINEII-3000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Emerald Mine II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $3268. However the true start address is $3000. But to dump, you must set a breakpoint at $3003, which will hit when you start the game. This is important so as to avoid graphical corruption issues.
